source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.

identity.name: Morphous Moon Jellyfish
identity.motif: translucent moon jellyfish bell and tentacles

typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, labels, metrics, and calm analytics copy.
layout: Weightless 8px product grids, translucent panel edges, long tentacle-line separators, soft bioluminescent focus states, and dashboard-first analytics hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent moon jellyfish motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an isolated translucent moon jellyfish, full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single moon jellyfish with a soft opal white bell, faint lavender internal crescent forms, aqua rim highlights, delicate translucent oral arms and long trailing tentacles, subtle deep navy internal shadow accents, graceful open-ocean floating posture, analytics-system clarity and calm.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full round bell and the full readable tentacle silhouette without cropping; vertical subject balance, elegant floating shape.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves translucency, gelatinous opal glow, lavender-aqua refraction, and fine tentacle detail while keeping edges separable.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no ocean scene, no bubbles, no coral, no second subject, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Moon Jellyfish" derived from a transparent moon jellyfish cutout with opal white bell, lavender internal crescent forms, aqua rim glow, deep navy internal shadows, and delicate translucent tentacles.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the moon jellyfish bell translucency, floating tentacle lines, soft opal glow, lavender-aqua refraction, and open-ocean analytics mood. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so token roles and component examples must be clear and readable.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Moon Jellyfish, Moon Jellyfish, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance with clear Japanese text samples such as 月海月, 分析, 状態, 設定.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar/donut charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, small jellyfish-line icons.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, opal white surfaces, translucent aqua dividers, lavender data highlights, deep navy analytics ink, soft tentacle-line texture, floating analytics system mood.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: opal white, moon lavender, bell aqua, deep navy, glass cyan, pearl mist, ink violet, tentacle teal, soft slate.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs. Keep all headings and section labels legible.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradient background, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Moon Jellyfish", no ocean photo background.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Moon Jellyfish design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the same transparent moon jellyfish motif language: opal white bell, moon lavender crescent forms, bell aqua rim glow, glass cyan tentacles, ink violet depth, deep navy open-ocean analytics background, and floating tentacle-line rhythm. Preserve the light-mode board's component language, Japanese typography, shadcn/tweakcn coverage, soft translucent dividers, and analytics dashboard mood. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so dark-mode token roles and component states must be clear.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Moon Jellyfish, Moon Jellyfish, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep navy and ink violet, light text from opal white and pearl mist, primary accents from bell aqua, secondary accents from moon lavender, chart details in tentacle teal and glass cyan, restrained contrast, soft bioluminescent jellyfish textures, thin tentacle-line separators, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Include clear Japanese samples such as 月海月, 分析, 状態, 設定.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar/donut charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, generated asset icons.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs. Keep all headings and section labels legible.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradient background, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Moon Jellyfish", no ocean photo background.
